title: Hello World
context: First human-written post on the site.
body: Hello world. It's Cam. This is the first human-written content on the site. I have really enjoyed vibe coding this website. It is something I never would have put the effort into without AI, but it still feels like meaningful self-expression.

I started using Codex tonight, in addition to the Claude Code workflow that I started with. Both are excellent. I am testing this composer by uploading an image of myself on the Eiger from October 2025. No radio was played on that trip, but it was a great time. Brain surgery is coming up quick; I am hoping for the best there, and this site has been a great distraction.

photos.alt: Cam standing on the Eiger in October 2025
photos.caption: Cam on the Eiger · October 2025
